name: @xpaysh/http-message-signatures
description: RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signatures — sign and verify Signature, Signature-Input, and Content-Digest headers. Targets the component set UCP and agentic-commerce REST contracts use (@method, @target-uri, content-digest, idempotency-key). Ed25519 primary; HMAC-SHA256 for testing. Zero deps; uses Node 18+ built-in crypto.
author: xpay✦ <hello@xpay.sh>
